ingredients: Macrogol 3350 13.125 g Sodium bicarbonate 178.5 mg Sodium chloride 350.7 mg Potassium chloride 46.6 mg
long_description:
MOVICOL is macrogol 3350 + electrolytes
Macrogol is a PEG -high molecular weight polymer which is non-toxic, pharmacologically inert, and virtually unabsorbed. The macrogol attracts and holds water in the bowel for effective stool softening. The electrolytes in MOVICOL help mitigate the possibility of electrolyte imbalance and dehydration.
MOVICOL has a 4 in 1 action
1. Hydrates and bulks
2. Softens
3. Triggers natural movement in the bowel
4. Lubricates the stool
MOVICOL is lactose free, gluten free, sucrose free.
For effective relief from constipation and treatment of chronic constipation; treatment of medically diagnosed faecal impaction.
  • Contains Macrogol 3350PLUS electrolytes (salts) (Sodium chloride, Potassium chlorideand sodium bicarbonate) BENEFITIt is an iso osmotic solution which prevents the net loss or gain of water and electrolytes in the body.

  • Water and electrolytes are absorbed by the stool to soften and lubricate the stoolsBENEFITGentle action

  • Lactose Free, Gluten Free and Sucrose FreeBENEFITCan be used by people who are lactose or gluten intolerant and diabetics

  • Great FlavoursBENEFITEasy to take

  • Bulk preparations can be stored in the Fridge for 6 hoursBENEFITLittle or no wastage

  • Comes in easy to use sachetsBENEFITIdeal for at home and travel.

long_description:
MOVICOL is macrogol 3350 + electrolytes
Macrogol is a PEG -high molecular weight polymer which is non-toxic, pharmacologically inert, and virtually unabsorbed. The macrogol attracts and holds water in the bowel for effective stool softening. The electrolytes in MOVICOL help mitigate the possibility of electrolyte imbalance and dehydration.
MOVICOL has a 4 in 1 action
1. Hydrates and bulks
2. Softens
3. Triggers natural movement in the bowel
4. Lubricates the stool
MOVICOL is lactose free, gluten free, sucrose free
For effective relief from constipation and treatment of chronic constipation; treatment of medically diagnosed faecal impaction.
  • Contains Macrogol 3350PLUS electrolytes (salts) (Sodium chloride, Potassium chlorideand sodium bicarbonate) BENEFITIt is an iso osmotic solution which prevents the net loss or gain of water and electrolytes in the body.

  • Water and electrolytes are absorbed by the stool to soften and lubricate the stoolsBENEFITGentle action

  • Lactose Free, Gluten Free and Sucrose FreeBENEFITCan be used by people who are lactose or gluten intolerant and diabetics

  • Great FlavoursBENEFITEasy to take

  • Bulk preparations can be stored in the Fridge for 24 hoursBENEFITLittle or no wastage

  • Comes in easy to use sachetsBENEFITIdeal for at home and travel.
name: Flavour Free Sachet

Rennie No Added Sugar tablets contain two antacids called calcium carbonate and magnesium carbonate which neutralise excess stomach acid by turning it into water & other natural substances. Rennie is an antacid that provides fast relief from indigestion, heartburn, acidity and dyspepsia. It neutralises stomach acid to relieve pain and discomfort.
It has a great tasting Spearmint flavour.
When symptoms strike, Rennie quickly gets to work to relieve painful symptoms so you can get on with your life. It can be taken day or night to relieve heartburn and indigestion fast.
It is also suitable for use during pregnancy. It starts to work in seconds for relief in minutes.

Not getting enough fibre in your daily diet? Benefiber is a 100% natural daily fibre boost. It's clear, taste-free and dissolves into almost anything.

Unlike some fibre supplements, Benefiber is invisible, tasteless and dissolves completely, which means you can add it to just about anything. Benefiber can deliver up to 20-25% of your recommended daily fibre intake. Simply sprinkle it in your water, coffee or juice. Add it to your yoghurt or pop it into your cooking to include fibre in your diet. Benefiber won't alter the taste or texture of your foods or beverages. You won't even know it's there!

Now it's easier than ever to add fibre to your diet with Benefiber, made from 100% natural ingredients that you can mix with almost anything.

Benefiber makes taking fibre easier. It dissolves completely in most beverages and soft foods. Taste-free, no added sugar and made from wheat. Be creative with Benefiber. Try it in your coffee, juice, yoghurt, your baked goods, favourite recipes or whatever you desire to add fibre to your diet. It's even great for cooking!

long_description:
64% Isopropyl Alcohol Antiseptic

Kills germs on the body

Cleans hands without water

Cleanser and Freshener

 

Isocol Rubbing Alcohol is an antiseptic, cleanser and freshener, all in one handy bottle.

Made up of 64% isopropyl alcohol and kills germs on the skin, Isocol evaporates quickly, and leaves your skin feeling fresh and fragrant.

Kills germs on skin.

Hand sanitiser - Isocol kills 99% of germs on the skin with no water, no mess, and no fuss. Keep it with you and keep bacteria at bay.

Earcare - Prep for new piercings, dab Isocol on a cotton tip to prep the area for newly pierced ears.

Pimples and spots - Our 64% Isopropyl Alcohol solution sanitises the skin around the area of the pimple or spot, which may help to reduce the chance of skin infections caused by surface.

First aid kits - Whether you're thinking ahead or responding to an incident - Isocol will clean your hands prior to attending to the emergency.

Public toilets - Everyone's worst nightmare. Use Isocol to sanitise your hands upon leaving public restrooms to ensure you don't take any germs from the tap, door or other surfaces around with you.

Foot odour - To remove foot odour, spritz your feet with Isocol.

Working out? - Dumbbells, golf clubs, cricket bats, gloves, mitts and skin guards - protect yourself from communal sports/gym equipment germs by sanitising your hands with Isocol in between stations.

Working from home? - Busy day at the desk? Don't forget to spray your hands with Isocol.

Australian made & owned

  • 64% Isopropyl Alcohol

  • Antiseptic

  • Kills germs on the skin

  • Cleans hands without water

  • Cleanser & freshener

  • Recommended by GP's.

  • Australian made & owned.
name: Antiseptic Rubbing Alcohol

Elastoplast Waterproof XXL dressings are sterile wound dressings for waterproof protection of everyday medium to larger wounds. With their waterproof, flexible film and strong adhesion, the dressings are ideal for washing, showering, bathing, swimming or other wet/water-based activity. The extra-large wound pad cushions your wound without sticking to it, providing high comfort during wear and has strong adhesion, keeping the plaster on through various types of conditions. The dressings are also available in three different sizes, which seal all around the wound to help protect from contamination and infection: XL - 6 cm x 7 cm, XXL - 8 cm x 10 cm and 4XL - 10 cm x 20 cm. The dressing also contains 0% latex.

Bacteria Shield*: Elastoplast plasters block 99% of dirt and bacteria. Always read the label and follow the directions for use.
  • Waterproof and breathable - Waterproof XXL dressings are transparent and can be used while swimming, showering or other wet activity

  • Strong adhesion - keeps the dressing on through various conditions

  • Latex free and sterile with highly absorbent, non-stick wound pad

  • Protects like a second skin - The flexible, breathable adhesive material acts as a second skin, completely sealing off wounds even while wet to deliver infection protection

  • Skin friendly - Suitable for covering large wounds, especially for covering wounds after surgery or after seeing a doctor

During wear, the soft and gentle silicone adhesive creates a bond between the plaster and the uneven surface of the skin and when removed, leaves the skin without residues. As a result, the plaster sticks securely to the skin, even after being repositioned. These sensitive plasters are the ideal solution for children with sensitive skin who require extra-gentle and soft wound treatment. They're also an excellent choice when frequent plaster changes are necessary. Sensitive Kids is available in two sizes for the protection and covering of minor small to medium wounds.

Always read the label and follow the directions for use.

Telfast contains an active ingredient called fexofenadine hydrochloride. It is one of a group of medicines called antihistamines. Antihistamines help reduce allergic symptoms by preventing the effects of a substance called histamine, which your body produces when exposed to certain substances. Telfast is a non-sedating antihistamine which means it has been shown to not cause drowsiness.

Use Telfast 120mg for the relief of the symptoms of hayfever allergies: 
- Sneezing
- Runny & Itchy Nose
- Itchy & Watery Eyes
- Itchy Throat

long_description:
Zyrtec Rapid Acting 24 hour Hayfever Allergy Relief Antihistamine Liquid Capsules are a soft gel capsule that relieve hayfever allergy symptoms.

When your immune system takes offence to an outside particle or substance, your body produces antibodies to attack this normally harmless substance by releasing a chemical called histamine.

Zyrtec contains the active ingredient, cetirizine, which helps to block the production of histamines to relieve symptoms of hayfever allergies. Cetirizine is part of a class of medications called antihistamines.

Zyrtec Liquid Capsules provide fast powerful 24 hour relief of hayfever allergy symptoms, including:
- Sneezing
- Runny, itchy nose
- Red, itchy and watery eyes
- Post nasal drip

Zyrtec is effective against seasonal hayfever triggers, such as:
- Grass Pollen
- Tree Pollen
- Weed Pollen
  • Hayfever & Allergy Relief

  • 24 Hour Relief

  • Antihistamine

  • 10 Liquid Capsules
name: Rapid Acting Hayfever Allergy Relief Antihistamine Liquid Capsules

ingredients: See Packaging for details.
long_description:
Take control of your health with the TouchBio RSV, Flu A/B & COVID-19 Rapid Antigen Test. This testing kit is designed to accurately detect and distinguish between RSV, Influenza A/B, and COVID-19 in a single test. It offers a faster pathway to diagnosing these common respiratory infections, ensuring timely access to the right treatment.

Why Choose TouchBioTriple RAT -2 Tests?
Very High Sensitivity (> 98%) and very high specificity (>99%) for all four viruses
Detects 4 virus antigens in a single test and major Covid19 Variants of Concern
Test Time: 15-20 mins
Specimen Type: Nasal Swab, less discomfort than NPS swab
Ease of Use: Simple, user-friendly testing procedure.
Shelf-Life: 24 Months

When to Use the TouchBio Triple RAT -2 Tests ?
Feeling Unwell: If you experience general malaise or sickness.
Exhibiting respiratory symptoms: such as coughing, sneezing, sore throat, chills, and shortness of breath.
After Exposure: for individuals who have been in close contact with someone diagnosed with RSV, Flu, or COVID-19.
When travelling: Easy to carry anywhere and convenient self-testing

Remember, symptoms of these respiratory illnesses can be remarkably similar. Using the TouchBio Rapid Antigen Test can help in making informed health decisions more quickly. Always consult a healthcare professional for guidance and follow-up care.

ARTG Number: 408459
  • Very High Sensitivity (> 98%) and very high specificity (>99%) for all four viruses

  • Detects 4 virus antigens in a single test

  • Ease of Use: Simple, user-friendly testing procedure

  • Shelf-Life: 24 Months
name: 3 In 1 Home Test Kit RSV- Flu A&B- Covid 19

long_description:
If you suffer from seasonal hayfever allergies, you know that it can have an impact on your day to day living. Symptoms include: sneezing, itchy watery eyes and runny nose. Claratyne Hayfever Allergy Relief tablets provide fast, non-drowsy relief that lasts for 24 hours. Claratyne Hayfever Allergy Relief tablets are small and easy to swallow and provide relief from the symptoms triggered by seasonal allergens. Just one dose a day provides rapid 24 hour relief from sneezing, runny nose and itchy, watery eyes
Hayfever allergy occurs when a person's immune system reacts to substances in the environment that are harmless for most people. These substances are known as allergens and include pollen from trees, grass and weeds. Upon exposure to an allergen, histamine is released and people with hayfever allergies can experience uncomfortable symptoms such as sneezing, runny nose or itchy and watery eyes.
Claratyne is an antihistamine that works by blocking the effects of histamines and helps relieve symptoms caused by seasonal hayfever allergies.

  • Just one dose a day provides rapid 24 hour relief from sneezing, runny nose and itchy, watery eyes

  • Provides non-drowsy and 24 hour relief from the symptoms of hayfever allergy.

  • Claratyne Hayfever Allergy Relief tablets are small and easy to swallow
name: Allergy Hayfever Relief Antihistamine Tablets

long_description:
Coles Children's Hayfever Allergy Relief 5 mg


  • Fast acting allergy relief
  • Grape flavoured chewable tablets
  • 10 tablets


When your child is experiencing hay fever and allergy symptoms, like a runny nose, sneezing and itchy and watery eyes, Coles Children's Hayfever Allergy Relief can help.


Coles Children's Hayfever Allergy Relief contains 5mg of the active ingredient Loratadine and works quickly to provide effective treatment of seasonal allergic rhinitis in adults and children 6 years of age and older. Hay fever can leave children feeling drained and prevent them from participating in everyday activities. When symptoms strike, Coles Children's Hayfever Allergy Relief offers rapid and long-lasting relief in non-drowsy, grape-flavoured chewable tablets.


Talk to your healthcare professional before taking this product if the hay fever symptoms are being experienced for the first-time and check with your doctor or pharmacist before using this medicine if you're pregnant or breastfeeding. This product is not suitable for children aged under 6 years. Don't exceed the recommended dose or use with other antihistamines.
name: Childrens Chewable Hayfever Allergy Relief Tablets

ingredients: Active Ingredients: Fexofenadine Hydrochloride 180mg Inactive Ingredients: Croscarmellose sodium, pregelatinised maize starch, microcrystalline cellulose, magnesium stearate, hypromellose, povidone, titanium dioxide, colloidal anhydrous silica, macrogol 400 and iron oxide.
long_description:
Telfast 180mg Tablets for hayfever allergy relief. Telfast 180mg is an antihistamine that provides fast, non-drowsy relief of hayfever allergy symptoms and itchy skin rash or hives.

Use Telfast 180mg for relief of the following hayfever allergy symptoms:

  • Sneezing

  • Runny and itchy nose

  • Itchy and watery eyes

  • Itchy throat

Use Telfast 180mg for the relief of the following symptoms of itchy skin rash or hives (urticaria):

  • Itchy skin rash

  • Itch caused by hives

  • Swelling related to allergy

  • Swelling related to hives

Telfast hayfever allergy relief is fast acting antihistamine - it works within just 1 hour. Telfast 180mg also provides 24 hour relief of symptoms.

Telfast contains an active ingredient called fexofenadine hydrochloride. It is one of a group of medicines called antihistamines. Antihistamines help reduce allergic symptoms by preventing the effects of a substance called histamine, which your body produces when exposed to certain substances.

Telfast is a non-sedating antihistamine which means it has been shown to not cause drowsiness. With just one tablet a day you can get on with your day without worrying about your allergies.

  • Relieves hayfever allergy symptoms - sneezing, runny & itchy nose, itchy & watery eyes, and itchy throat

  • Relieves symptoms of hives - itchy skin rash, itch caused by hives, and swelling related to allergy or hives

  • Contains fexofenadine, a non-drowsy antihistamine

  • Fast acting relief (works in 1 hour) that lasts for 24 hours

  • Always read the label and follow the directions for use. Do not use if you are pregnant or breastfeeding unless advised by a doctor or pharmacist Do not use in children under 12 years.
name: Hayfever Relief 180mg

When your immune system takes offence to an outside particle or substance, your body produces antibodies to attack this normally harmless substance by releasing a chemical called histamine.

Zyrtec contains the active ingredient, cetirizine, which helps to block the production of histamines to relieve symptoms of hayfever allergies. Cetirizine is part of a class of medications called antihistamines.

Zyrtec Hayfever Allergy Mini Tablets provide fast powerful 24 hour relief of hayfever allergy symptoms, including:
- Sneezing
- Runny, itchy nose

long_description:
Zyrtec Kids Rapid Acting 12 hour Hayfever Allergy Relief Mini Antihistamine Chewable Tablets in Grape flavour relieve hayfever allergy symptoms, and are sucrose and gluten free. Zyrtec Kids Chewable Tablets are suitable for kids aged 6+ who are transitioning from liquids to solids. They are mini, easy to chew tablets that offer on the go relief without the need for water.

Zyrtec Kids contains the active ingredient, cetirizine, which helps to block the production of histamine to relieve symptoms of hayfever allergies. Cetirizine is part of a class of medications called antihistamines.

When your little ones' immune system takes offence to an outside particle or substance, their body produces antibodies to attack this normally harmless substance by releasing a chemical called histamine. Antihistamines work by blocking histamine receptors, keeping their immune system from reacting to the allergen.

Zyrtec Kids Chewables provide fast powerful 12 hour relief of hayfever allergy symptoms, including:
- Sneezing
- Runny, itchy nose
- Watery, itchy eyes
- Post nasal drip

Zyrtec Kids is effective against hayfever allergy triggers, such as:
- Pollen
- Grass
  • Fast allergy relief made for kids 6+

  • Mini, easy to chew tablets that offer on the go relief without the need for water

  • Comes in a kid friendly, great grape flavour

  • Perfect for kids transitioning from liquids to a solid

  • Free from sucrose and gluten

With regular use, it helps maintain mobility and comfort. This makes it a great addition to your daily routine, providing ongoing support for all your muscles aches and pains.

Clinically tested* fisiocrem Solugel was shown to significantly reduce pain and improve mobility within minutes of application when used twice daily. fisiocrem Solugel continued to improve acute and chronic musculoskeletal pain and mobility over 14 days, showing that it is effective for both immediate and long-term pain relief.

*Ramon et al Ortho & Rheum Open Access J 20(1): OROAJ.MS.ID.556028 (2022)

long_description:
Do you have pain, tenderness or swelling associated with inflammation or injury? Rub Voltaren Pain Relief Gel on your point of pain for targeted pain relief. Voltaren Pain Relief Gel penetrates deep into your skin with a dual benefit that relieves pain and reduces inflammation.

Voltaren Pain Relief Gel is a medicated product containing a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug, or NSAID, in the form of an emulsion gel. The active ingredient (diclofenac) in our gels penetrates deep into the skin, reducing inflammation at the source to relieve pain.

It works differently from heat or cooling rubs, that work by heating or cooling the skin. Voltaren Pain Relief Gel instead allows an anti-inflammatory (diclofenac) to penetrate the skin deep down in order to relieve pain and reduce inflammation where you need it.
Voltaren Pain Relief Gel can be used for the relief of pain and inflammation in soft-tissue injuries, trauma of the tendons, ligaments, muscles and joints, due to sprains and strains (e.g. in sports injuries), Localised forms of soft tissue rheumatism including tendonitis and bursitis. It can also be used to relieve mild osteoarthritis pain of the knees and fingers.

Voltaren Pain Relief Gel formula combines the qualities of a gel and a cream, that has an appealing smell, is easy to rub in and rapidly absorbed, and even provides a cooling and soothing effect when applied to the skin. Delivering pain relief to help you get back to the movement that you love!

Carefully read all information provided with the product before use.
  • With Emulgel technology which allows the active ingredient to penetrate through the skin to the point of pain

  • Relieves pain and reduces inflammation

  • Suitable for sprains, strains and minor sports injury

  • Helps you move again

  • Non greasy and low odour
name: Pain Relief Gel

Tiger Balm can be used by adults and children over 2 years old to give temporary relief from muscle aches and pains.

How to use:
Rub gently on the affected parts of the skin as often as necessary (usually 3 to 4 times daily).


Safety Warning:
If your condition does not improve after two weeks or gets worse, seek medical advice.
Do not use on children under two years of age.
See leaflet for further details.
Do not apply to broken skin. Consult a doctor and discontinue use if irritation occurs. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes. For external use only. Keep out of the sight and reach of children. Fire hazard: do not smoke or go near naked flames; clothing and bedding with this product dried on them can catch fire easily. Zovirax Cold Sore Cream delivers the active ingredient, aciclovir, efficiently and deeply into your skin to fight the virus that causes cold sores. Designed to be simple to use and effective, apply Zovirax Cold Sore Cream at the first tingle to get to the cause of your cold sore. Zovirax Cold Sore Cream is uniquely formulated to maximise penetration. Zovirax Cold Sore Cream contains the anti-viral agent, aciclovir 5%, that stops the multiplication of the cold sore virus. Zovirax MAC-P penetrating formula gets to the site of infection. Use Zovirax Cold Sore Cream five times daily at approximately four hourly intervals for four days.
  • Zovirax Cold Sore Treatment cuts cold sore healing time in half compared with no treatment. **On average compared with historical data for untreated cold sores

 Compeed combats cold sores.

long_description:
What are warts?
Warts are viral infections of the skin. Viral warts may appear at any age but are most commonly found in older children. Warts are spread via contact with the virus and most often appear on sites subject to trauma i.e. fingers, elbows, knees and feet.

What is Wart-Off Stick for?
For the treatment of common and plantar warts.

Who is Wart-Off Stick for?
For children and adults with common or plantar warts.

Why should I use Wart-Off Stick?
Wart-Off Stick has no messy liquids and is easy to apply. It is a convenient way to remove and destroy wart tissues.

Signs of mild dehydration:

Sticky or dry mouth, increased thirst, lethargy, decreased urine output, dark yellow urine.

Be aware that:

Dehydration due to vomiting or diarrhoea can be dangerous in babies and children under 5 years old and in elderly people.

Coles Hayfever Allergy Relief 180mg


  • Fast acting allergy relief
  • Non-drowsy
  • 10 tablets


When you're experiencing hay fever and allergy symptoms, like a runny nose, itchy and watery eyes, and irritated throat, you need fast acting, effective relief. Coles Hayfever Allergy Relief contains 180mg of the active ingredient fexofenadine hydrochloride and provides long-lasting relief, up to 24-hours. The non-drowsy formula doesn't contain gluten and works quickly so you can start to feel better, sooner. Coles Hayfever Allergy Relief comes with 10 easy to swallow tablets and is suitable for adults and children over 12 years.


When symptoms of hay fever strike, take 1 tablet of Coles Hayfever Allergy Relief daily, as required, and be sure to see your doctor or pharmacist if symptoms persist after 5 days. Only take the recommended dose and don't take Coles Hayfever Allergy Relief with other antihistamines. If you're pregnant or breast feeding, talk to your doctor or pharmacist before taking this product.

long_description:
Advil Tablets provide effective pain relief at great everyday value. Each Advil Tablet contains 200mg ibuprofen and is a round, sugar coated tablet that is easy to swallow. Use Advil Tablets for temporary relief of pain and discomfort from everyday pains and aches. Advil Tablets also reduce fever.
Advil Tablets temporarily relieve pain and discomfort from common pains such as:
- Headache
- Migraine headache
- Period Pain
- Dental Pain
- Sore throat
- Minor Arthritis Pain
- Pain associated with the common cold and flu
Advil Tablets temporarily relieve acute pain where inflammation is present such as:
- Back Pain
- Neck Pain
- Muscle Pain
Advil Liquid Capsules also reduce fever.
The pain reliever in Advil is ibuprofen, which is part of a class of drugs called non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAID). NSAIDs like Advil reduce the amount of pain causing chemicals produced by the body. This reduction in chemicals helps lead to reduced inflammation and pain. Ibuprofen-based NSAIDs are commonly used to manage pain and inflammation (swelling and redness) associated with some common types of musculoskeletal disorders, and treat non-inflammatory conditions such as headaches, migraine headaches and period pain, and to reduce fever.
Contains: Sugars, Benzoates, Hydroxybenzoates, Sulfites and Soya Beans or Soya Bean Products.
  • Fast Pain relief

  • Sugar Coated Tablet

  • Reduces Fever

  • Great everday value

  • Easy to swallow

ingredients: The active ingredient in CARTIA is Acetylsalicylic Acid (Aspirin) 100mg. Other ingredients are guar gum, and a coating system including sunset yellow FCF aluminium lake (CI 15985).
long_description:
*CARTIA low dose aspirin has a DUENTRIC coating which is designed to protect the stomach from the irritation that can be caused by the aspirin.

The enteric coating on CARTIA tablets prevents the aspirin from being released in your stomach where it could cause gastric upsets. The aspirin is released lower down in the intestines, where it is absorbed gradually in the blood stream.

Low dose aspirin helps reduce blood stickiness, the tendency of blood to clot. CARTIA helps prevent blood clotting and reduces the risk of heart attack and stroke in patients with known cardiovascular or cerebrovascular disease. For use under medical supervision only. The use of low dose aspirin may be only one component of your medical practitioner's management plan to prevent you having a further heart attack or stroke. You should discuss this plan with your medical practitioner. Do not substitute other medicines containing aspirin, for this medicine, without first consulting your Pharmacist or medical practitioner.
  • Australia's No. 1 selling low dose aspirin based on IRI Scan Data, National Pharmacy, Value, MAT to 09/11/2025

  • Proudly Australian made.

  • DUENTRIC coating helps protect the stomach lining from irritation that can be caused by aspirin.

  • CARTIA can be taken with or without food. Food does not alter the effects of Cartia

  • CARTIA comes in a handy calendar blister pack

  • Free from: Sugar, Gluten, Yeast, Soy, Lactose & Preservatives.

  • CARTIA's unique orange colour can help aid recognition and visibility for patients taking multiple medications.

long_description:
Do you have pain, swelling, and inflammation in muscles and joints? Rub Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly on your point of pain for targeted pain relief. Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly has a dual benefit that relieves joint pain* and reduces inflammation, to help get you moving again.

Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly penetrates the skin 3x faster*+ and provides long lasting targeted pain relief. *vs Voltaren Pain Relief Gel in vitro +Quartarone, G., & Hasler-Nguyen, N. (2014). Comparison of Diclofenac Diethylamine Gel Formulations.

Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly is a medicated product containing a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug, or NSAID, in the form of an emulsion gel. The active ingredient (diclofenac) [in our gels] (delete 'in our gels') penetrates deep into the skin and provides pain relief for up to 12 hours, without a tablet.

It works differently from heat or cooling rubs, that work by heating or cooling the skin. The Emulgel technology used in Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly has an added permeation enhancer, which helps more active ingredient diclofenac to penetrate deeply through the skin and reach the site of the pain, inflammation, and swelling, where you need it.

Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly formula combines the qualities of a gel and a cream, that has an appealing smell, is easy to rub in and rapidly absorbed, and even provides a cooling and soothing effect when applied to the skin. Delivering pain relief to help you get back to the movement that you love!

Carefully read all information provided with the product before use.

Voltaren Pain Relief Gel 12 Hourly is available with a cap that is easy to open, which is especially important if you experience mild osteoarthritis pain in your fingers.

*joint pain from mild osteoarthritis of the fingers and knees

  • With Emulgel technology with an added permeation enhancer allowing more active ingredient to penetrate through the skin deep to the point of pain

  • Provides up to 12 hours of pain relief

  • Reduces inflammation and relieve muscle pain

  • Only needs to be applied twice a day, morning and evening

  • Contains a concentrated dose of diclofenac

  • Effective for mild osteoarthritis of the knees and fingers.

long_description:
The 1st Connected* craving relief Spray in the world.
*by technology to an app

Uses Near Field Communication (NFC) technology to connect to a behavioural support app so you can track your progress against a personalised quit plan, to help you quit for good.

QuickMist SmartTrack makes you 2.5x more likely to quit*
*Tonnesen P, et al. Efficacy and safety of a novel nicotine mouth spray in smoking cessationOpen link in new window: A randomised, placebo-controlled, double blind, multicentre study with 52-week follow up

Use in conjunction with the Nicorette Stop Smoking app to:

Tap and track your NRT usage
Set personalized goals and structure your quit plan
Get tips and support on how to stop smoking
Track your smoke-free days
See how much money you could save by quitting

  • Nicorette QuickMist is a fine mist nicotine mouth spray

  • 1mg of nicotine per spray

  • Each Quickmist spray bottle contains 150 sprays; Freshmint flavour

  • Nicorette's fastest nicotine craving relief paired with a behavioural support app to help you quit for good

The Lightweight Nourishing Mask, infused with Ceramides, durably nourishes the hair without weighing it down. *Tested on natural hair and skin tone combinations based on scientific publications.

L'Oreal Paris Preference Permanent hair colour, now featuring a luxurious oil-in-gel no drip formula forlasting, multidimensional colour. With a high concentration of dyes, Preferenceprovides 9 weeks of fade-defying* andmultidimensional colour, respecting the hair'snatural highs and lows, for a look that is radiant,luminous and lasting.It's suitable for all hair textures, offering fade-defyingcolour* and multidimensional shine and 100% grey coverage**.FADE-DEFYING COLOURPreference has a high concentration of high-tenacity dyesthat penetrate hair fibres for 9 weeks of fade-defyingcolour*.LIQUID GEL TECHNOLOGYFormulated with an innovative oil-in-gel formula,Preference perfectly coats the hair so that lightbounces back for an even, natural shine.The innovative Liquid Gel Technology locks in the dyesto accentuate reflections, revealing multidimensionalcolour with intense radiance.The bonus: this new formula doesn't drip for an easy,mess-free application at home.*Consumer test except for copper/red shades.** Instrumental tests on grey hair swatches before and after using Preference.
  • Up to 9 weeks of fade-defying colour*

  • Luminous colour full of reflects

  • 100% grey coverage

  • No drip oil in gel formula

  • Conditioner enriched with UV filter and Vitamin E

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

long_description:
Schwarzkopf Nordic Blonde G1 Lightening Spray gradually lightens your hair shade per application. The lightening result can be intensified by external heat, e.g. hair dryer or sunlight. To achieve a lighter result, it can be re-applied 3-5 times with an interval of 2-3 days between applications and for a maximum lift of 2 levels. Once the maximum lift has been achieved, you can reuse the product again after 4-6 weeks. The spray is easy to apply and is quickly absorbed into the hair for 3 possible looks: allover sunkissed blonde, soft highlights or dip-dye.
The results?
3 possible looks: all-over sunkissed blonde, soft highlights or dip-dye.
  • HEAT-ACTIVATED FORMULA WITH CARING ARGAN OIL.

  • RADIANT SUNKISSED BLONDEWITH GOLDEN HIGHLIGHTS

  • Up to 2 levels of lift (gradual lightening)

  • Up to 20 applications.
name: Nordic Lightening Spray G1

long_description:
Nice 'N Easy colour blend technology gives you ultimate natural-looking colour by layering rich tones and contouring highlights in one simple step.
Nice 'N Easy lasts up to 8 weeks and promises 100% grey coverage. We have also included our exclusive ColourSeal Conditioning Gloss to help seal in beautiful, natural-looking colour and add intense shine.
If you love this shade, keep it looking perfect with Nice 'N Easy Root Touch-Up, to touch up roots between colourings.

  • Colour Blend Technology layers delicate tones and contouring highlights in one step

  • Long lasting formula

  • 100% grey coverage

  • Contains ColourSeal Gloss to keep your colour looking fresh

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Preference Permanent hair colour, now featuring a luxurious oil-in-gel no drip formula forlasting, multidimensional colour. With a high concentration of dyes, Preferenceprovides 9 weeks of fade-defying* andmultidimensional colour, respecting the hair'snatural highs and lows, for a look that is radiant,luminous and lasting.It's suitable for all hair textures, offering fade-defyingcolour* and multidimensional shine and 100% grey coverage**.FADE-DEFYING COLOURPreference has a high concentration of high-tenacity dyesthat penetrate hair fibres for 9 weeks of fade-defyingcolour*.LIQUID GEL TECHNOLOGYFormulated with an innovative oil-in-gel formula,Preference perfectly coats the hair so that lightbounces back for an even, natural shine.The innovative Liquid Gel Technology locks in the dyesto accentuate reflections, revealing multidimensionalcolour with intense radiance.The bonus: this new formula doesn't drip for an easy,mess-free application at home.*Consumer test except for copper/red shades.** Instrumental tests on grey hair swatches before and after using Preference.
  • Up to 9 weeks of fade-defying colour*

  • Luminous colour full of reflects

  • 100% grey coverage

  • No drip oil in gel formula

  • Enriched with a UV filter and Vitamin E

NOBLE BROWNS & NATURAL REFLEXES
The intensive colour crème with Micro-Oils gently penetrates deep into the hair fibre and seals in the highly concentrated colour pigments. For noble brown hair tones with natural reflexes.


DEEP NOURISHMENT FOR INTENSE SHINE
The deeply nourishing conditioner with natural oils delivers intense shine and leaves hair feeling silky soft.

PERFECT GREY COVERAGE
Discover the intensive crème colour for beautiful hair and perfect grey coverage from root to tip.

long_description:
NEW L'Oreal Paris Preference Vivids range is our most innovative expertise in bold colours. The formula is infused with a blend of powerful pure dyes selected by our hair colour experts for ultra-vibrant colours. Achieve up to 3X shinier hair* with Preference ultra vibrant colours, featuring light reflecting dyes, for a luminous colour full of reflects. The Shine Protect Conditioner is enriched with a UV filter and Vitamin E to preserve your shine for up to 8 weeks** of radiant colour. Preference Vivid Colours is available in 7 fashion inspired shades. Shade Blue Black was inspired by Le Marais fashion street style and its iconic alive blue jeans. Create yourown look with this vivid Blue Black colour.*Instrumental Test**if the shine protect conditioner is applied weekly
  • High impact vivid colours

  • Formula is infused with a blend of powerful pure dyes selected by hair colour experts for ultra-vibrant colours.

  • Achieve up to 3X shinier hair* with light reflecting dyes and a luminous colour full of reflects. *Instrumental test

  • Up to 8 weeks of radiant colour** (**if the shine protect conditioner is applied weekly).

  • Available in 7 high impact, bold fashion colours.
name: Preference Vivids 1.102 Blue Black

Brite Purple Semi-Permanent Moisturizing Hair Color transforms your hair into a vibrant purple haze.

Best results on very light (white) blonde or pre-lightened hair.

This is a semi-permanent direct dye, so it does not develop like a permanent hair color. What you see is what you get!

You can mix with other BRITE Semi-Permanent Colors to create your own custom shade.

Mix with conditioner to create lighter pastel colors.

Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring with Excellence Crme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with Hyaluronic Acid. 100% grey coverage from root to tip. L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme gives you a rich, deep, natural and even colour available in a wide spectrum of shades. Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair. The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The new caring gentle post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and smooths the hair to reveal its radiance. Complete your routine with the new caring lightweight mask that intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Nourished, healthy hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

description: COLOURLESS HAIR COLOUR REMOVER MAX EFFECT
long_description:
Whether it is a change of mind, a hair colour blunder or you are looking to remove colour build up, Colourless Hair Colour Remover is the colouring companion that you might not have known existed.


Ideal for removing artificial colour from the hair, no bleach or ammonia. The safe and gentle formulation works by breaking the bonds holding the artificial colour pigments in your hair shaft, allowing them to be rinsed away.

  • Hair colour removal

  • Wash your colour away

  • Works on black, brown and red dyes

  • No bleach or ammonia
name: Hair Colour Remover Max Effect

long_description:
Napro Palette  - Long-lasting rich colour.

Enjoy the new Napro Palette with 7-Oils Serum - a permanent colouration with nourishing oils, enriched with intense colour pigments in a rich creme formulation. For stunningly rich, long-lasting oil cared colour with up to 30% more care (vs. untreated hair) and a luscious glowing shine.

The 7-Oils Serum Treatment for extra care & glamorous shine.

The rich 7-Oils Serum treatment with over a million oil droplets, is specially developed to maximise the care effect on hair after colouring, leaving it beautifully soft, easy to detangle and amazingly supple to touch. The indulgent 7-Oils Serum transforms hair by treating it deeply from the inside and providing it with a beautiful healthy look. Better cared for hair will give an intensified colour result and glamorous shine.

Excellent Lightening Effect.

The highly effective creamy formula of Napro Palette lightens your hair for bright and healthy-looking blonde tones.

Did You Know?

The intensive caring colour creme with concentrated colour pigments and nourishing oils provides your hair with rich, long-lasting intense colours and a luxurious shine. 

The rich 7-Oils Serum treatment contains over a million oil droplets that indulge your hair with extraordinary care, for beautiful and healthy looking hair that is amazingly supple to touch.

Newly developed colour formula with rich oils for perfect grey coverage results.
name: 10-1 Ultra Light Ash Blonde Permanent Hair Colour

After undergoing a bleaching service, the pH level of hair becomes alkaline. This can lead to dull and porous hair. The new Preference Acidic Toner rebalances the pH level of hair to its natural range preserving hair quality with nutrition and softness. Get up to 4 weeks of pure blonde, in 5 minutes.*Instrumental Test
  • 4 Weeks of Anti Brassiness

  • Silkier, 4x Nourished Hair*

long_description:
Nice 'N Easy colour blend technology gives you ultimate natural-looking colour by layering rich tones and contouring highlights in one simple step.
Nice 'N Easy lasts up to 8 weeks and promises 100% grey coverage. We have also included our exclusive ColourSeal Conditioning Gloss to help seal in beautiful, natural-looking colour and add intense shine.
If you love this shade, keep it looking perfect with Nice 'N Easy Root Touch-Up, to touch up roots between colourings.
  • Permanent colour for beautiful, natural-looking colour with a blend of tones and highlights

  • Colour Blend Technology layers delicate tones and contouring highlights in one step

  • Long lasting formula

  • 100% grey coverage

  • Contains ColourSeal Gloss to keep your colour looking fresh
name: Nice 'n Easy 9b Natural Light Beige Blonde Permanent Hair Colour

long_description:
The Excellence Universal Nudes ammonia-free permanent Hair Colour range deeply cares for your hair thanks to a triple care color routine:The colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin and protective agents to protect the hair as it colours, providing all the intensity of a permanent hair dye. Formulated with the universal reflect U, a unique blend of cool and warm reflects, these shades guarantee a natural-looking colour result that flatters on all skin tones. Evaluated by hundreds of consumers, these hair shades flatter all complexions*. The Caring Gentle PH Shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and smoothes the hair to reveal its radiance. The Lightweight Nourishing Mask, infused with Ceramides, durably nourishes the hair without weighing it down. *Tested on natural hair and skin tone combinations based on scientific publications.
  • Cover 100% of Greys

  • Universally Flattering Shades

  • Ammonia Free Triple Care Colour

Change your hair colour as often as you like with Schwarzkopf LIVE Colour Ultra Brights! Express your colour creativity and re-create the latest trends with stunning bright hair and maximum colour intensity for up to 10 washes.
The gentle and vegan formula* does not contain ammonia, peroxide or resorcinol and the conditioning colour mask provides superior condition and shine. Ready to use without mixing - quick and easy to apply. Now in a resealable tube with 2x more product for multiple uses.

  • Now in a resealable tube for multiple uses

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Preference Permanent hair colour, now featuring a luxurious oil-in-gel no drip formula forlasting, multidimensional colour. With a high concentration of dyes, Preferenceprovides 9 weeks of fade-defying* andmultidimensional colour, respecting the hair'snatural highs and lows, for a look that is radiant,luminous and lasting.It's suitable for all hair textures, offering fade-defyingcolour* and multidimensional shine and 100% grey coverage**.FADE-DEFYING COLOURPreference has a high concentration of high-tenacity dyesthat penetrate hair fibres for 9 weeks of fade-defyingcolour*.LIQUID GEL TECHNOLOGYFormulated with an innovative oil-in-gel formula,Preference perfectly coats the hair so that lightbounces back for an even, natural shine.The innovative Liquid Gel Technology locks in the dyesto accentuate reflections, revealing multidimensionalcolour with intense radiance.The bonus: this new formula doesn't drip for an easy,mess-free application at home.*Consumer test except for copper/red shades.** Instrumental tests on grey hair swatches before and after using Preference.
  • Up to 9 weeks of fade-defying colour*

  • Luminous cool blonde full of reflects

  • 100% grey coverage

  • No drip oil in gel formula

  • Anti Brass Mask

NEW L'Oreal Paris Preference Vivids range is our most innovative expertise in bold colours. The formula is infused with a blend of powerful pure dyes selected by our hair colour experts for ultra-vibrant colours. Achieve up to 3X shinier hair* with Preference ultra vibrant colours, featuring light reflecting dyes, for a luminous colour full of reflects. The Shine Protect Conditioner is enriched with a UV filter and Vitamin E to preserve your shine for up to 8 weeks of radiant colour**. L'Oreal Paris Preference Vivid Colours is available in 7 fashion inspired shades. Shade Silver Grey was inspired by the cold, trendy and magnetic silver night life in Soho. Create your own look with this vivid Silver Grey colour. Made for all hair types, the formula comes in a gel texture and 150ml mix kit to provide an easy and even application.*Instrumental Test** If the shine protect conditioner is applied weekly
  • High impact vivid colours

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Nourished, healthy hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch in the shade Cool Brown is an instant root concealer spray that covers grey roots in just one quick spray - whenever, wherever, and however you need. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch perfectly matches and blends in with your hair colour, all while delivering on the mantra of #GreysGoneIn3Seconds. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown takes only 3 seconds to give you a flawless root touch up. With a pinpoint micro-diffuser, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown precisely targets greys and its rich colour pigments give you perfectly blended coverage. The quick, yet thorough touch-up lasts until washed out. With its lightweight, no-transfer formula, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown delivers a perfect fix.What does the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown do?L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown is a revolutionary instant root concealer spray that flawlessly covers grey roots with a quick spray. Now, handle all your grey hair touch-ups in just three seconds with the Magic Retouch L'Oreal Paris Cool Brown. Besides covering roots, it can also help to make your scalp less visible! The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown delivers rich, dark root touch ups that blend in seamlessly with your natural or coloured hair. Magic Retouch gives you a precise root touch up with a pinpoint micro-diffuser that targets your greys. The rich colour pigments by L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown give you perfectly blended coverage that gives your hair a fuller and natural look. The lightweight, no-transfer L'Oreal Paris Root Touch Up Cool Brown keeps your roots darkened and comfortable until washed out.What makes it effective?The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown accurately targets grey hair to give you a precise root touch-up instantly. Magic Retouch uses a pinpoint micro-diffuser that accurately targets greys. With rich colour pigments, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown ensures that the touch up blends in seamlessly with your natural or dyed hair colour. Delivering perfect results immediately, Magic Retouch keeps you ready for all occasions in just three seconds. Its weightless, transfer-proof formula keeps your touch-up intact until washed off. Get flawless hair colour instantly with the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Cool Brown.
  • Instant Root Coverage

  • Blends naturally with your colour

  • Easy Application

  • Water and heat resistant, transfer proof

  • Lasts 1 shampoo

long_description:
It's time to make an appointment with Olia.To bring the best performing salon-inspired hair colour straight to your home, Olia has developed an improved formula for hair colour. Discover Olia.Oil-powered hair colour that stays true to tone and resists fading for a long- lasting, deep red colour result with a hint of burgundy reflects. The 1st permanent home hair colour powered by oil, not ammonia, to reduce damage. Olia's Oil Delivery System infuses colour deep into the heart of the hair fibre to give you maximum colour performance and visibly improve hair quality. 98% of women saw no visible damage*.To keep your hair visibly healthy and for optimal experience during the process, our formula is:AMMONIA FREESILICONE FREEThe Olia hair colour range is:Vegan**Approved by Cruelty Free International Under the Leaping Bunny ProgrammeAN EASY APPLICATION KITWith our easy application kit and non-drip velvety formula, everyone can create great hair colour looks, just like a pro. MORE SUSTAINABLE PACKAGINGOur new packaging is made with 43% less plastic and 11% less cardboard***.*instrumental Test** No animal derived ingredients*** compared to the previous kit
  • up to 100% Grey Coverage

  • 3x More Shine

  • Intense Long Lasting Colour

  • Ammonia Free

  • Vegan Formula
name: 4.62 Intense Deep Red

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Preference Permanent hair colour, now featuring a luxurious oil-in-gel no drip formula forlasting, multidimensional colour. With a high concentration of dyes, Preferenceprovides 9 weeks of fade-defying* andmultidimensional colour, respecting the hair'snatural highs and lows, for a look that is radiant,luminous and lasting.It's suitable for all hair textures, offering fade-defyingcolour* and multidimensional shine and 100% grey coverage**.FADE-DEFYING COLOURPreference has a high concentration of high-tenacity dyesthat penetrate hair fibres for 9 weeks of fade-defyingcolour*.LIQUID GEL TECHNOLOGYFormulated with an innovative oil-in-gel formula,Preference perfectly coats the hair so that lightbounces back for an even, natural shine.The innovative Liquid Gel Technology locks in the dyesto accentuate reflections, revealing multidimensionalcolour with intense radiance.The bonus: this new formula doesn't drip for an easy,mess-free application at home.*Consumer test except for copper/red shades.** Instrumental tests on grey hair swatches before and after using Preference.
  • Up to 9 weeks of fade-defying colour*

  • Luminous colour full of reflects

  • 100% grey coverage

  • No drip oil in gel formula

  • Conditioner enriched with UV filter and Vitamin E

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring with Excellence Crme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with Hyaluronic Acid. 100% grey coverage from root to tip. L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme gives you a rich, deep, natural and even colour available in a wide spectrum of shades. Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair. The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The new caring gentle post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and smooths the hair to reveal its radiance. Complete your routine with the new caring lightweight mask that intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

  • New Post Colour Shampoo is gentle on scalp & hair

  • Nourished, healthy hair

  • Natural, multi-tonal colour

Brite Pink Semi-Permanent Moisturizing Hair Color transforms your hair into a vibrant pink that packs a punch.

Best results on very light (white) blonde or pre-lightened hair.

This is a semi-permanent direct dye, so it does not develop like a permanent hair color. What you see is what you get!

You can mix with other BRITE Semi-Permanent Colors to create your own custom shade.

Mix with conditioner to create lighter pastel colors.

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch in the shade Black is an instant root concealer spray that covers grey roots in just one quick spray - whenever, wherever, and however you need. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch perfectly matches and blends in with your hair colour, all while delivering on the mantra of #GreysGoneIn3Seconds. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black takes only 3 seconds to give you a flawless root touch up. With a pinpoint micro-diffuser, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black precisely targets greys and its rich colour pigments give you perfectly blended coverage. The quick, yet thorough touch-up lasts until washed out. With its lightweight, no-transfer formula, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black delivers a perfect fix.What does the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black do?L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black is a revolutionary instant root concealer spray that flawlessly covers grey roots with a quick spray. Now, handle all your grey hair touch-ups in just three seconds with the Magic Retouch L'Oreal Paris Black. Besides covering roots, it can also help to make your scalp less visible! The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black delivers rich, dark root touch ups that blend in seamlessly with your natural or coloured hair. Magic Retouch gives you a precise root touch up with a pinpoint micro-diffuser that targets your greys. The rich colour pigments by L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black give you perfectly blended coverage that gives your hair a fuller and natural look. The lightweight, no-transfer L'Oreal Paris Root Touch Up Black keeps your roots darkened and comfortable until washed out.What makes it effective?The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black accurately targets grey hair to give you a precise root touch-up instantly. Magic Retouch uses a pinpoint micro-diffuser that accurately targets greys. With rich colour pigments, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black ensures that the touch up blends in seamlessly with your natural or dyed hair colour. Delivering perfect results immediately, Magic Retouch keeps you ready for all occasions in just three seconds. Its weightless, transfer-proof formula keeps your touch-up intact until washed off. Get flawless hair colour instantly with the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Black.
  • Instant Root Coverage

  • Blends naturally with your colour

  • Easy Application

  • Water and heat resistant, transfer proof

  • Lasts 1 shampoo

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

Schwarzkopf Nordic Blonde offers oil-enriched lightening with up to 9 levels of lift. Now available with a new & improved technology, HaptIQ System delivering up to 90% less hair breakage and a natural-looking blonde with great anti-yellow effect.

Comes with a post-colour treatment with purple pigments to help counter unwanted yellow tones, to protect and keep healthy-looking blonde hair.

Suitable For: Dark Blonde to Dark Brown hair. Not suitable for more than slightly grey hair.

Haptic System technology overview:

Based on molecular hair science, the post-colour treatment with HaptIQ System cares for the hair by:
1. Creating new micro-bonds within the hair
2. Coating the hair with a protective layer after colouring
3. Restoring strength for up to 90 % less hair breakage

Product Claims: Up to 90% less hair breakage (vs. untreated hair).
  • Oil-enriched lightening, delivering up to 90% less hair breakage

  • Delivers natural-looking blonde with great anti-yellow effect

  • Comes with post-colour treatment with purple pigments to counter unwanted yellow tones

long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch in the shade Brown is an instant root concealer spray that covers grey roots in just one quick spray - whenever, wherever, and however you need. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch perfectly matches and blends in with your hair colour, all while delivering on the mantra of #GreysGoneIn3Seconds. L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown takes only 3 seconds to give you a flawless root touch up. With a pinpoint micro-diffuser, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown precisely targets greys and its rich colour pigments give you perfectly blended coverage. The quick, yet thorough touch-up lasts until washed out. With its lightweight, no-transfer formula, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown delivers a perfect fix.What does the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown do?L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown is a revolutionary instant root concealer spray that flawlessly covers grey roots with a quick spray. Now, handle all your grey hair touch-ups in just three seconds with the Magic Retouch L'Oreal Paris Brown. Besides covering roots, it can also help to make your scalp less visible! The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown delivers rich, dark root touch ups that blend in seamlessly with your natural or coloured hair. Magic Retouch gives you a precise root touch up with a pinpoint micro-diffuser that targets your greys. The rich colour pigments by L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown give you perfectly blended coverage that gives your hair a fuller and natural look. The lightweight, no-transfer L'Oreal Paris Root Touch Up Brown keeps your roots darkened and comfortable until washed out.What makes it effective?The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown accurately targets grey hair to give you a precise root touch-up instantly. Magic Retouch uses a pinpoint micro-diffuser that accurately targets greys. With rich colour pigments, the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown ensures that the touch up blends in seamlessly with your natural or dyed hair colour. Delivering perfect results immediately, Magic Retouch keeps you ready for all occasions in just three seconds. Its weightless, transfer-proof formula keeps your touch-up intact until washed off. Get flawless hair colour instantly with the L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Brown.
  • Instant Root Coverage

  • Blends naturally with your colour

  • Easy Application

  • Water and heat resistant, transfer proof

  • Lasts 1 shampoo

long_description:
Experience visibly better hair quality than before colouring* with Excellence Creme by L'Oreal Paris, now enriched with hyaluronic acid.Our kit provides 100% grey coverage, giving your hair up to 10x more moisture* and 2x richer colour**.The application is easy thanks to our non-drip crme formula, suitable for all hair types.Our Triple Care Colour ritual cares for your colour, cares for your scalp and cares for your hair.The protective colouring cream is enriched with Pro-Keratin for long lasting colour. The gentle scalp post-colour shampoo delicately cleanses the scalp and hair by gently rinsing away excess residue.Formulated specifically to be used right after colouring your hair. Complete the routine with the caring lightweight mask which is infused with conditioning ingredients, our mask intensively nourishes the hair without weighing it down.*instrumental test after use of the whole kit*instrumental testHow To Use:1) Add the L'Oreal Paris Excellence Crme colouring cream to the developer and shake well to mix.2) Apply the mix to your hair, starting from the roots then throughout the lengths and ends. Leave in hair for 30 mins. 3) Rinse your hair until the water runs clear. Use the Caring Gentle pH Shampoo to remove any excess residue.4) Apply a hazelnut amount of the Lightweight Nourishing Mask. Leave in for 3 mins then rinse your hair. Use the mask once a week until your next colour for soft, shiny, lively hair.IMPORTANT - The colour of the mix looks different than before, but hair colour results remains the same as long as it is not rinsed before the 30-minute processing time.
  • Includes our triple care colour ritual, 1. Caring colouring cream, 2. Caring gentle scalp post-colour shampoo, 3. Caring lightweight mask

  • 100% Grey Coverage

Now, handle all your grey hair touch-ups in just three seconds with the Magic Retouch L'Oreal Paris Dark Brown. Besides covering roots, it can also help to make your scalp less visible! The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Dark Brown delivers rich, dark root touch ups that blend in seamlessly with your natural or coloured hair. Magic Retouch gives you a precise root touch up with a pinpoint micro-diffuser that targets your greys. The rich colour pigments by L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Dark Brown give you perfectly blended coverage that gives your hair a fuller and natural look. The lightweight, no-transfer L'Oreal Paris Root Touch Up Dark Brown keeps your roots darkened and comfortable until washed out.What makes it effective?The L'Oreal Paris Magic Retouch Dark Brown accurately targets grey hair to give you a precise root touch-up instantly. Nice 'N Easy colour blend technology gives you ultimate natural-looking colour by layering rich tones and contouring highlights in one simple step.
Nice 'N Easy lasts up to 8 weeks and promises 100% grey coverage. We have also included our exclusive ColourSeal Conditioning Gloss to help seal in beautiful, natural-looking colour and add intense shine.
If you love this shade, keep it looking perfect with Nice 'N Easy Root Touch-Up, to touch up roots between colourings.
  • Permanent colour for beautiful, natural-looking colour with a blend of tones and highlights

  • Colour Blend Technology layers delicate tones and contouring highlights in one step

  • Long lasting formula

  • 100% grey coverage

  • Contains ColourSeal Gloss to keep your colour looking fresh

long_description:
Introducing Clairol Root Touch-Up Semi-Permanent Colour Blending Gel. Refresh your roots in just 10 minutes - without damaging your hair. This easy-to-use, no-mix gel formula comes ready to apply with its built-in applicator brush. Each application of the reusable formula conceals greys for up to 10+ washes. It's ammonia-free, peroxide-free, and worry-free hair colour. Apply to your temples, roots, and hairline to extend the life of your colour in minutes. Just brush, rinse, and go!
  • The first 10-wash, risk-free way to mask greys

  • Semi-permanent

  • Peroxide & ammonia free formula

  • Simple, no mixing, no mess, no fuss, application

  • Damage free formula

  • Leaves hair soft and shiny.
name: Root Touch-up Colour Blending Gel 4 Dark Brown
